findings.summary: 2 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #dropdown-btn (contrast 2.98), #dropdown-btn (contrast 2.98)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.
